title: polyscias scutellarioides
intro: Polyscias scutellarioides, also known as the Cabbage Palm or Sensitive Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Polyscias scutellarioides include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Polyscias scutellarioides include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health issues.
